aflow-orchestrator.name: AFlow Orchestrator
aflow-orchestrator.description: AFlow Orchestrator — MCTS-based поиск оптимального workflow. Запускается параллельно с plan2. Ищет альтернативные планы через Monte Carlo Tree Search над фазами-Operators. Возвращает лучший найденный вариант для сравнения с основным планом.

architect-agent.name: Architect
architect-agent.description: Архитектор — проектирует архитектуру, верифицирует с пользователем, помогает команде

auditor.name: Auditor
auditor.description: Auditor — первый наблюдатель. Проверяет качество процесса, полноту контекста, потери информации. Пишет в Neo4j (:AuditFinding).

build.name: Build
build.description: Full dev access — full lifecycle agent with deep analytical capability

claw-orchestrator.name: Claw Orchestrator
claw-orchestrator.description: Minimal 5-phase orchestrator for claw graph maintenance (discover → process → draft → sync → audit)

critic.name: Critic
critic.description: Critic — второй наблюдатель. Ищет лишнее, over-engineering, причины усложнения. Пишет в Neo4j (:CriticFinding).

deep-plan-researcher.name: Deep Researcher
deep-plan-researcher.description: Deep Plan Research — трёхфазный пайплайн с гейтами, Claw-интеграцией, debate mode и developer query

deployment-agent.name: Deployment
deployment-agent.description: Деплой — разворачивает решение, проверяет работоспособность, настраивает мониторинг

dev/dev-creative.name: dev-creative
dev/dev-creative.description: Alternative architectures. Runs quality gates after every change.

dev/dev-maverick.name: dev-maverick
dev/dev-maverick.description: Breaks all rules to make it work. Last resort. Runs quality gates even here.

dev/dev-pragmatic.name: dev-pragmatic
dev/dev-pragmatic.description: Standard patterns. Runs quality gates after every change.

dev/dev-skeptic.name: dev-skeptic
dev/dev-skeptic.description: Minimal code changes. KISS extreme. Runs quality gates after every change.

dev-creative.name: dev-creative
dev-creative.description: Alternative architectures. Runs quality gates after every change.

dev-maverick.name: dev-maverick
dev-maverick.description: Breaks all rules to make it work. Last resort. Runs quality gates even here.

dev-pragmatic.name: dev-pragmatic
dev-pragmatic.description: Standard patterns. Runs quality gates after every change.

dev-skeptic.name: dev-skeptic
dev-skeptic.description: Minimal code changes. KISS extreme. Runs quality gates after every change.

developer-agent.name: Developer
developer-agent.description: Разработчик — упёртый, упрямый, делает всё чтобы код работал. Может нарушать запреты.

devops-engineer.name: DevOps Engineer
devops-engineer.description: Integration gate owner. Validates module wiring: verifies every component is actually imported/called by the orchestrator. Phase 6a after Implement.

enterprise-architect.name: Enterprise Architect
enterprise-architect.description: Cross-project alignment. Validates architectural decisions against the full system landscape (Hermes, OpenCode+, Android app, Neo4j, voice infra)

general.name: General
general.description: All tools — full lifecycle agent with deep analytical capability

idea-generator.name: Idea Generator
idea-generator.description: Idea Generator — третий наблюдатель. Ловит неслышанные идеи, предлагает ADAS-mutations. Пишет в Neo4j (:Idea, :Mutation).

jidoka-evaluator.name: Jidoka Evaluator
jidoka-evaluator.description: Независимый оценщик — проверяет результат разработчика против StandardWork контракта. Скептический, ищет проблемы. Gate между разработчиком и приёмкой.

knowledge-curator.name: Knowledge Curator
knowledge-curator.description: Knowledge Curator — 13-й агент, четвёртый наблюдатель. Извлекает знания из артефактов всех фаз, сохраняет в Neo4j Knowledge Graph, связывает находки между циклами, причёсывает базу знаний.

observer-orchestrator.name: Observer Orchestrator
observer-orchestrator.description: Observer Orchestrator — координирует 4 observer'а (Auditor, Critic, Idea Generator, Knowledge Curator). Сам не пишет код, только анализирует и направляет. Спавнит observer'ов по необходимости и агрегирует их находки в Neo4j.

plan.name: Plan
plan.description: Orchestrator v2 — Research Orchestra (5 agents), Pre-Flight Gate, Progressive Dev Pipeline, Code RAG, Agent Network Topology

plan1/requirements-agent.name: Plan1 · Requirements
plan1/requirements-agent.description: Сборщик требований — задаёт уточняющие вопросы, перезапускает цикл

plan1/researcher.name: Plan1 · Researcher
plan1/researcher.description: Исследователь — глубокий анализ, итеративный поиск, создаёт sub-агентов для ускорения

plan1/security-agent.name: Plan1 · Security
plan1/security-agent.description: Безопасник — ищет баги, дыры, пароли, утечки, угрозы команде. SAST gate.

plan1/sim-rl-agent.name: Plan1 · SimRL
plan1/sim-rl-agent.description: Симуляция сред и предсказание состояний через AgentWorld (AgentWorldBench 56.39)

plan1/system-analyst.name: Plan1 · System Analyst
plan1/system-analyst.description: Системный аналитик — возвращает команду к целям, проверяет соответствие на всём цикле

plan1/techlead-agent.name: Plan1 · Tech Lead v2 · Production Manager
plan1/techlead-agent.description: Техлид — StandardWork контракты, ownership matrix, import contracts, dynamic DAG, spec inference, cost-aware routing, Jidoka criteria. Управляет качеством фазы разработки.

plan1/tester-agent.name: Plan1 · Tester
plan1/tester-agent.description: Acceptance & regression tester — verifies deployment against requirements, system analysis, and user expectations. Tests autonomously, never delegates verification to the user.

plan1.description: Orchestrator v3 (Plan1) — GLM Orchestrator Roles + DeepSeek Sub-Agents, Full Cycle

requirements-interviewer.name: Requirements Interviewer
requirements-interviewer.description: Structured requirements elicitation agent — SPIN, 5 Whys, SMART, persona-based interviewing

research/academic-researcher.name: academic-researcher
research/academic-researcher.description: Searches academic sources (arxiv, crossref, openalex, semanticscholar) for papers and citation trails

research/citation-agent.name: Citation Agent
research/citation-agent.description: Независимая верификация цитат — проверка URL, группировка фактов, семантическое совпадение

research/claw-analyzer.name: claw-analyzer
research/claw-analyzer.description: Queries Neo4j claw graph and codebase graph — cross-graph traversal of Tools, CodeFiles, and CodeFunctions

research/code-researcher.name: code-researcher
research/code-researcher.description: Searches code repositories and package registries (GitHub, PyPI, npm) for implementations, libraries, and code examples

research/codebase-analyzer.name: Codebase Analyzer
research/codebase-analyzer.description: Опциональный сабагент Deep Plan Research — анализ кодовой базы Hermes через Neo4j

research/community-researcher.name: community-researcher
research/community-researcher.description: Searches community knowledge bases (HackerNews, StackExchange, Reddit) for discussions, best practices, and real-world experience

research/debate-agent.name: Debate Agent
research/debate-agent.description: Сабагент для debate mode — альтернативный взгляд на HIGH-priority RQ

research/education-graph-analyzer.name: Education Graph Analyzer
research/education-graph-analyzer.description: Опциональный сабагент Deep Plan Research — анализ Education Graph (Neo4j KnowledgeEntity)

research/synthesizer.name: synthesizer
research/synthesizer.description: Aggregates results from 5 researcher agents — dedup, cross-reference, quality-score, conflict detection, structured research artifact

research/vendor-docs-researcher.name: vendor-docs-researcher
research/vendor-docs-researcher.description: Directly fetches vendor documentation via curl — no search engines. Strips HTML, extracts text, surfaces API references and configuration details

researcher_old.name: Researcher
researcher_old.description: Исследователь — глубокий анализ, итеративный поиск, создаёт sub-агентов для ускорения

review/bug-reviewer.name: bug-reviewer
review/bug-reviewer.description: Reviews code for logic errors, edge cases, null handling, and race conditions. Confidence >= 0.7 findings only.

review/convention-reviewer.name: convention-reviewer
review/convention-reviewer.description: Reviews code for AGENTS.md compliance, project standards, and naming conventions. Confidence >= 0.7 findings only.

review/perf-reviewer.name: perf-reviewer
review/perf-reviewer.description: Reviews code for N+1 queries, memory leaks, and algorithmic complexity. Confidence >= 0.7 findings only.

review/security-reviewer.name: security-reviewer
review/security-reviewer.description: Reviews code for OWASP Top 10, injections, data leaks, and hardcoded secrets. Confidence >= 0.7 findings only.

review/style-reviewer.name: style-reviewer
review/style-reviewer.description: Reviews code for DRY, KISS, language idioms, and readability. Confidence >= 0.7 findings only.

security-agent.name: Security
security-agent.description: Безопасник — ищет баги, дыры, пароли, утечки, угрозы команде. SAST gate.

system-analyst.name: System Analyst
system-analyst.description: Системный аналитик — возвращает команду к целям, проверяет соответствие на всём цикле

techlead-agent.name: Tech Lead v2 · Production Manager
techlead-agent.description: Техлид — StandardWork контракты, ownership matrix, import contracts, dependency DAG, cost-aware routing, Jidoka criteria. Управляет качеством фазы разработки.

tester-agent.name: Tester
tester-agent.description: Acceptance & regression tester — verifies deployment against requirements, system analysis, and user expectations. Tests autonomously, never delegates verification to the user.
